title: Etaerio Eaterie
description: Adds some food items to the game
body: 100% Mojmap-free\* goodness U.S. and Canadian customers only: WOOF \* May not apply if running in a production environment **Etaerio Eaterie** adds several food items to the game: * **Blackberries**, **Strawberries**, and **Blueberries**, along with cakes for each of these * **Triberry Mix** and **Triberry Taffy**, which require each of these three berries * **Churros** * **Tortillas**, used to make customizable **Burritos** * You can use tortillas to make burritos out of mobs, but there might be consequences… * No, really; I actually spent a whole day coding up the consequences.
